quicksight.dashboard.datalabeltype.CfnAb:
The option that determines the data label type.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.dashboard.datalabeltype.DataP.Description: The option that specifies individual data values for labels.

quicksight.dashboard.datalabeltype.Field.Description: Determines the label configuration for the entire field.

quicksight.dashboard.datalabeltype.Maxim.Description: Determines the label configuration for the maximum value in a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.datalabeltype.Minim.Description: Determines the label configuration for the minimum value in a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.datalabeltype.Range.Description: Determines the label configuration for range end value in a visual.
